'''鈭歬-p-d''' ('''kakapad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chalk|chalk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chalk|chalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kakapad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikapad|thikapad]] || [[word:jikapad|jikapad]] || [[word:shikapad|shikapad]] || [[word:kikapad|kikapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukapad|thuthukapad]] || [[word:jujukapad|jujukapad]] || [[word:shushukapad|shushukapad]] || [[word:kukukapad|kukukapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukapad|thukapad]] || [[word:jukapad|jukapad]] || [[word:shukapad|shukapad]] || [[word:kukapad|kukapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukapad|thukapad]] || [[word:jukapad|jukapad]] || [[word:shukapad|shukapad]] || [[word:kukapad|kukapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekapad|thekapad]] || [[word:jekapad|jekapad]] || [[word:shekapad|shekapad]] || [[word:kekapad|kekapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokapad|thothokapad]] || [[word:jojokapad|jojokapad]] || [[word:shoshokapad|shoshokapad]] || [[word:kokokapad|kokokapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokapad|thokapad]] || [[word:jokapad|jokapad]] || [[word:shokapad|shokapad]] || [[word:kokapad|kokapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokapad|thokapad]] || [[word:jokapad|jokapad]] || [[word:shokapad|shokapad]] || [[word:kokapad|kokapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kapad|th忙kapad]] || [[word:j忙kapad|j忙kapad]] || [[word:sh忙kapad|sh忙kapad]] || [[word:k忙kapad|k忙kapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakapad|thathakapad]] || [[word:jajakapad|jajakapad]] || [[word:shashakapad|shashakapad]] || [[word:kakakapad|kakakapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapad|thakapad]] || [[word:jakapad|jakapad]] || [[word:shakapad|shakapad]] || [[word:kakapad|kakapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapad|thakapad]] || [[word:jakapad|jakapad]] || [[word:shakapad|shakapad]] || [[word:kakapad|kakapad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakapad|shakapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakapad|goshakapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakapad|gokishakapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakapadn眉|shakapadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakapadnkn眉|goshakapadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapadn眉|gokishakapadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakapadsh毛|shakapadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakapadnksh毛|goshakapadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakapadsh毛|gokishakapadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapadro|shakapadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapadnkro|goshakapadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapadro|gokishakapadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapadmu|shakapadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapadnkmu|goshakapadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapadmu|gokishakapadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakapadsher|shakapadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakapadnksher|goshakapadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakapadsher|gokishakapadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakapadng|shakapadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakapadnkng|goshakapadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakapadng|gokishakapadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakapadya|shakapadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakapadnkya|goshakapadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakapadya|gokishakapadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakapadyam|shakapadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakapadnkyam|goshakapadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakapadyam|gokishakapadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapadn眉sh毛|shakapadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapadnkn眉sh毛|goshakapadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapadn眉sh毛|gokishakapadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapadn眉ro|shakapadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapadnkn眉ro|goshakapadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapadn眉ro|gokishakapadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapadn眉mu|shakapadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapadnkn眉mu|goshakapadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapadn眉mu|gokishakapadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapadsh毛n眉|shakapadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapadnksh毛n眉|goshakapadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapadsh毛n眉|gokishakapadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapadsh毛ro|shakapadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapadnksh毛ro|goshakapadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapadsh毛ro|gokishakapadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapadsh毛mu|shakapadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapadnksh毛mu|goshakapadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapadsh毛mu|gokishakapadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapadron眉|shakapadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapadnkron眉|goshakapadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapadron眉|gokishakapadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapadrosh毛|shakapadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapadnkrosh毛|goshakapadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapadrosh毛|gokishakapadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapadromu|shakapadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapadnkromu|goshakapadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapadromu|gokishakapadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapadmun眉|shakapadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapadnkmun眉|goshakapadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapadmun眉|gokishakapadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapadmush毛|shakapadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapadnkmush毛|goshakapadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapadmush毛|gokishakapadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapadmuro|shakapadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapadnkmuro|goshakapadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapadmuro|gokishakapadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
